english translation text: Ziyarat Syeda Fatima Masooma e Qom (SA)

In the Name of Allah, the
All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O daughter of the Messenger of Allah!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ فَاطِمَةَ وَ خَدِيجَةَ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, daughter of Fatimah and Khadeejah!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, daughter of the Commander of the faithful!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ الْحَسَنِ وَ الْحُسَيْنِ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, daughter of Hasan and Husain!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ وَلِيِّ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, daughter of the vicegerent of Allah!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا أُخْتَ وَلِيِّ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, sister of the vicegerent of Allah!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا عَمَّةَ وَلِيِّ اللَّهِ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, Aunt of the vicegerent of Allah!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ مُوسَى ابْنِ جَعْفَرٍ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, daughter of Mosa bin Jafar!
May Allah confer His Mercy and blessing on you!
